summary: Refactored the 9-dimension signal pipeline to 10 active dimensions, targeting genuine alpha generation across four categories: information edges, behavioral edges, execution discipline, and signal decay awareness.

decisions.rationale: Both measured directional agreement (EMA alignment vs. timeframe consensus). Correlated dimensions split IC weight unnecessarily. Merged score_directional() frees a slot for higher-quality signal with no information loss.

Reddit mention velocity is meme-prone. Setting to False rather than deleting preserves the code for IC auto-re-enable if 60-trade IC proves alpha. Short-circuits Reddit API call to save 2-5s per scan.
Most documented behavioral finance anomaly. Analysts underreact to earnings surprises; drift continues 20-60 days. Uses yf.get_earnings_dates() — no new dependencies. Long-only, 6-hour cache.
High short float + volume surge + price above Donchian resistance = asymmetric upside. Finviz scrape for short float (already in news_sentinel.py). Long-only, 4-hour cache.
Equity risk premium accrues disproportionately overnight — one of the most persistent anomalies. Computed from df_1d already fetched in compute_indicators(), stored in sig_1d. Zero extra API calls.
Eliminates manual dimension flag management. IC < -0.02 for 3 weeks triggers disable; IC > +0.01 for 2 weeks re-enables. Writes to data/settings_override.json. Appends to audit_log.jsonl.
Institutions cannot play small caps at scale. Less efficient markets = exploitable anomalies persist longer. Separate score threshold (22 vs 18) and position sizing (5% vs 10%). Stage 4b in pipeline.
IC history resets on dimension refactor (old 'trend'/'mtf' keys excluded by DIMENSIONS guard). Lower threshold speeds recovery of IC-weighted scoring on the new dimension set.

what_alpha_this_captures.information_edge: DIRECTIONAL (fast structure processing), PEAD (faster than manual traders on earnings), SMALL_CAP (institutional blindspot)
what_alpha_this_captures.behavioral_edge: PEAD (underreaction anomaly), SHORT_SQUEEZE (forced covering), OVERNIGHT_DRIFT (persistent overnight premium)
what_alpha_this_captures.execution_discipline: IC auto-disable prevents riding dead signals, small cap sizing respects risk, social short-circuit reduces noise
what_alpha_this_captures.signal_decay_awareness: IC auto-disable/re-enable makes decay tracking automatic, audit trail tracks every dimension state change

next_steps: Monitor PEAD scoring on first scan cycle — check signals_log.jsonl for pead > 0 entries after earnings events
Monitor SHORT_SQUEEZE — if Finviz blocks (403), disable via dimension_flags.short_squeeze = False
After 60+ new trades: run ic_calculator.update_ic_weights() and review dimension weights for new dims
Phase 2 gate (200+ trades): raise ic_min_threshold to 0.03 to suppress residual noise
Consider adding OVERNIGHT_DRIFT to theme_tracker themes (overnight drift varies by sector)
